name: Super Mario 64 (Render96 HD)
description: Native Linux build of Render96ex (tester branch) with HD models (DynOS pack v3.25) and HD textures (pokeheadroom pack). OpenGL renderer — no Wine, no Proton, fast install. Enable the Render96 model packs in-game via Pause → Options → DynOS to swap the original low-poly Mario for the rounded HD version. For real-time path tracing instead, see the Ray Tracing variant.

romInfo.description: Select your Super Mario 64 US ROM file (.z64 format)
